description:
## Background `bsm-kia.13` requires a final contract step once every spec has migrated to importing from `helpers/rpc.ts` and `helpers/sidebar.ts`. Until the local copies and inline selectors are deleted, dead code lingers and the duplicated/shotgun surface remains available for future specs to copy from. This sub-issue removes the old form and proves its absence with a `rg` acceptance check. ## What to build Final delete-and-verify pass: prove that no spec redeclares any interface, lambda, helper, or sidebar selector from either helper module. The canonical implementations are the only source. ## Technical Approach - Confirm `bsm-kia.13.2` (Migrate all four specs) has landed. - Run `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent|\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts` and confirm zero hits. If any hits remain, do not delete; either roll back the migrate sub-issue or open a follow-up. - If either helper module exports a temporary compatibility shim (e.g., re-export from the old location for the migrate batch), delete it. - Update `docs/agents/webdriver-e2e.md` if it references the old per-spec helpers or inline selectors by name. ## Considerations - This sub-issue is intentionally tiny: it must be a single deletion + verification commit, not a refactor. - If the contract step requires a non-trivial cleanup (e.g., a rename or signature change), split it further rather than blending with the contract. - Don't delete the helper modules' symbols — only the old local copies and inline selectors. ## Acceptance criteria - [ ] `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible|expectSidebarWorkspacePath|expectSidebarWorkspaceAbsent|\[aria-label='Workspace'\]|p\.truncate|p\.text-muted" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts` returns zero hits. - [ ] No spec file imports the affected symbols from a path other than `helpers/rpc.ts` or `helpers/sidebar.ts`. - [ ] Renaming the sidebar `

` class in `WorkspaceSelector.tsx` now touches one helper file, not four spec files. - [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass. - [ ] No dead exports remain in any spec or fixture file. ## Test Plan - Run `pnpm exec ultracite check`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` — all must pass. - Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove no behavioral regression. - Inspect the final diff: every spec file's symbol declarations and inline selectors are gone, and the only declarations of the affected symbols live in `helpers/rpc.ts` and `helpers/sidebar.ts`.
title: Contract: delete local copies and inline selectors, verify rg
